description: Complete Hero section redesign - replace dark video background hero with a clean, editorial, white-background typographic hero inspired by Refokus/Clay/Studio Freight. Remove broken video reference, implement premium typography composition with better hierarchy, add subtle CSS-generated visual elements, and integrate advanced GSAP entrance animations.
steps: Completely rewrite components/Home/Hero.tsx - remove the dark video background approach and replace with a white/light editorial layout

Design typography composition: Use a large but NOT oversized headline (text-editorial-lg rather than text-editorial-xl), with balanced spacing. The hero message should be: 'We design and build exceptional websites and digital experiences'
Create a split-layout hero: left side has the main headline with editorial typography (large, bold, tight leading), right side has a short descriptor paragraph and a CTA button
Add subtle CSS-generated visual accents: a geometric SVG pattern or animated gradient shapes that float/move subtly, an accent line or dot-grid background at very low opacity
Implement GSAP staggered entrance animation: headline words reveal from bottom one by one, subtitle fades up, CTA slides in, decorative elements animate in with delay
Add a scroll-driven parallax effect on the decorative elements as user scrolls down
Add a mouse-follow subtle effect on decorative elements (they shift slightly based on cursor position)
Ensure the hero has proper vertical rhythm: min-h-screen with content vertically centered, generous padding-top to clear the fixed nav (pt-32 or more)
Include a scroll indicator at the bottom that animates (subtle bounce)
Ensure reduced-motion support: show all elements immediately without animation when prefers-reduced-motion is active
Remove ALL references to /videos/hero-reel.mp4 which does not exist
acceptance_criteria: Hero has white/light background - no dark video overlay
No references to non-existent video or image files
Typography is editorial but NOT oversized - uses text-editorial-lg or custom clamp sizes that fit well
Layout feels spacious and premium, not cramped
GSAP animations play on load with proper sequencing
Hero communicates clearly what CACOYANNIS LIMITED does
npm run build passes without errors
npm run lint passes without errors
